steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
The base area is the area of a circle, so use it to find the cone's radius:
$$\pi r^2=5{,}929\pi$$
$$r^2=5{,}929$$
$$r=77$$

steps.title: Find the slant height
steps.content:
The radius, height, and slant height form a right triangle, so use the Pythagorean theorem:
$$\ell^2=77^2+36^2=5{,}929+1{,}296=7{,}225$$
$$\ell=85$$The answer is D.
